elements_view.notes: Base projection primitive; keep separate from keys/values but anchor on the top-level adaptor page.

keys_view.notes: keys is a user-facing projection name and should not collapse into elements_view in hub navigation.

values_view.notes: values is a user-facing projection name and should not collapse into elements_view in hub navigation.

join_view.notes: Flattening behavior is the conceptual entry; iterator internals are related pages, not primary navigation.

join_with_view.notes: Delimiter-aware flattening needs an explicit canonical root because helper mechanics are noisy.

adjacent_view.notes: Treat adjacent as windowing/slicing rather than combining.

adjacent_transform_view.notes: Treat adjacent_transform as transform-first even though it is built on a windowing primitive.

chunk_view.notes: chunk_view has the worst outer/inner iterator fragmentation, so canonical entry must be pinned.

transform_view.notes: transform should stay on the adaptor root despite deep iterator/sentinel subtrees.

zip_view.notes: zip is a combine primitive; do not let subtype mechanics choose the canonical URL.

zip_transform_view.notes: zip_transform stays in combining because multi-range composition is still the dominant task framing.

enumerate_view.notes: enumerate adds index context and is best grouped with transform-style adaptors.

slide_view.notes: slide is a windowing operation and belongs with slicing, not with utility internals.

chunk_by_view.notes: chunk_by groups adjacent elements by predicate, but the user entry is still the adaptor root.

stride_view.notes: stride is a slicing adaptor; pin the canonical page to avoid helper/member drift.

lazy_split_view.notes: lazy_split has helper/member fragmentation; the conceptual entry is the top-level adaptor page.

split_view.notes: split remains a task-level slicing adaptor despite its helper-heavy page tree.

ambiguous_hints.elements_view: Projection primitive that overlaps with keys_view and values_view but should remain its own entry.
ambiguous_hints.keys_view: Alias-like specialization of elements_view, but users search for keys directly.
ambiguous_hints.values_view: Alias-like specialization of elements_view, but users search for values directly.
ambiguous_hints.join_view: Flattening could be described as combining or transforming; the hub treats it as combining.
ambiguous_hints.join_with_view: Flattening with delimiter crosses task boundaries, so explicit categorization is safer than heuristics.
ambiguous_hints.adjacent_view: Windowing has both slicing and combining flavors; the hub uses slicing.
ambiguous_hints.adjacent_transform_view: Combines windowing and mapping, so transform-first classification is an explicit UX choice.
ambiguous_hints.zip_view: zip has deep iterator/sentinel trees that should not displace the main adaptor entry.
ambiguous_hints.zip_transform_view: zip_transform spans combining and transforming, so it needs an explicit tie-break.
ambiguous_hints.chunk_view: chunk_view has the worst nested iterator tree and should always resolve to the adaptor root.
